name: roundz-enterprise
description: Roundz enterprise ride-hailing monorepo with backend microservices, admin microfrontends, Flutter apps, shared contracts and infrastructure.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:shared: npm run build -w @roundz/common && npm run build -w @roundz/dto
scripts.build:server: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @roundz/gateway && npm run build -w @roundz/auth-service && npm run build -w @roundz/user-service && npm run build -w @roundz/rider-service && npm run build -w @roundz/trip-service && npm run build -w @roundz/matching-service && npm run build -w @roundz/tracking-service && npm run build -w @roundz/wallet-service && npm run build -w @roundz/payment-service && npm run build -w @roundz/notification-service && npm run build -w @roundz/analytics-service && npm run build -w @roundz/admin-service && npm run build -w @roundz/kyc-service
scripts.build:admin: npm run build -w @roundz/admin-shared && npm run build -w @roundz/admin-user-management && npm run build -w @roundz/admin-rider-management && npm run build -w @roundz/admin-trip-monitoring && npm run build -w @roundz/admin-wallet-management && npm run build -w @roundz/admin-analytics-dashboard && npm run build -w @roundz/admin-notification-center && npm run build -w @roundz/admin-support-system && npm run build -w @roundz/admin-shell
scripts.test: npm run test -w @roundz/dto && npm run test -w @roundz/common
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up postgres redis redpanda mosquitto localstack
